=== Updated as of May 1st 2026 ===

{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Page !! Last edited !! User !! Global edits
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Ibjaja055]] || 2026-05-05T20:29:19Z || [[User:Ibjaja055]] || 29,779
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/EYo237]] || 2026-05-07T23:03:39Z || [[User:EYo237]] || 5,957
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Pharouqenr]] || 2026-05-07T17:20:57Z || [[User:Pharouqenr]] || 63,241
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Nnamadee]] || 2026-05-19T19:51:06Z || [[User:Nnamadee]] || 20,212
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Senator Choko]] || 2026-05-12T06:51:36Z || [[User:Senator Choko]] || 7,998
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/BnHamid]] || 2026-05-06T15:47:10Z || [[User:BnHamid]] || 79,742
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/ᱯᱨᱚᱯᱷᱮᱥᱥᱚᱨ]] || 2026-05-03T10:41:05Z || [[User:ᱯᱨᱚᱯᱷᱮᱥᱥᱚᱨ]] || 2,955
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/sardeeq]] || 2026-05-19T22:13:37Z || [[User:Sardeeq]] || 30,231
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Dolphyb]] || 2026-05-07T20:43:12Z || [[User:Dolphyb]] || 2,378,585
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Yendifa]] || 2026-05-10T19:22:39Z || [[User:Yendifa]] || 7,607
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Sir Amugi]] || 2026-05-15T04:23:12Z || [[User:Sir Amugi]] || 61,597
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Muhdavdullahi]] || 2026-05-15T10:49:20Z || [[User:Muhdavdullahi]] || 25,204
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Shahidul Hasan Roman]] || 2026-05-09T15:25:42Z || [[User:Shahidul Hasan Roman]] || 16,890
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Brazal.dang]] || 2026-05-11T06:20:25Z || [[User:Ballardmaize]] || 41,851
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Pragathi. BH]] || 2026-05-13T11:21:54Z || [[User:Pragathi. BH]] || 18,117
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Vinoda mamatharai]] || 2026-05-13T11:24:01Z || [[User:Vinoda mamatharai]] || 8,672
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Transmummy]] || 2026-05-11T22:15:26Z || [[User:Transmummy]] || 61
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Mercyuniverse]] || 2026-05-12T23:26:55Z || [[User:Mercyuniverse]] || 1,417
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Nguini Désiré]] || 2026-05-20T03:18:01Z || [[User:Nguini Désiré]] || 2,002
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Agbalagba]] || 2026-05-21T17:11:54Z || [[User:Agbalagba]] || 10,837
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Chinemeremprince]] || 2026-06-15T15:27:57Z || [[User:Chinemeremprince]] || 16,616
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Ola.mahadi]] || 2026-05-29T09:23:41Z || [[User:Ola.mahadi]] || 11,098
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Hamed Gamaoun]] || 2026-06-05T10:01:47Z || [[User:Hamed Gamaoun]] || unknown
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Jwale2]] || 2026-05-20T22:59:44Z || [[User:Jwale2]] || 26,085
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Tmamatha]] || 2026-05-13T20:40:33Z || [[User:Tmamatha]] || 7,502
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/V Bhavya]] || 2026-05-22T11:37:11Z || [[User:V Bhavya]] || 94,099
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/रोहित साव27]] || 2026-05-26T10:48:14Z || [[User:रोहित साव27]] || 104,201
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/muralikrishna m]] || 2026-05-27T13:16:47Z || [[User:Muralikrishna m]] || 47,892
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Nicole mwenge]] || 2026-06-01T21:17:24Z || [[User:Nicole mwenge]] || 8,001
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Albetudu]] || 2026-06-03T16:02:20Z || [[User:Albetudu]] || 3,018
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/নৰুনা বৰুৱা]] || 2026-06-17T05:53:46Z || [[User:নৰুনা বৰুৱা]] || 15,940
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Aminwa 21]] || 2026-06-15T15:26:20Z || [[User:Aminwa 21]] || 3,720
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Joy Agyepong (2nd Application)]] || 2026-06-17T12:25:38Z || [[User:Joy Agyepong]] || 5,457
|}
=== Messaged to update application ===

{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Page !! Last edited !! User !! Global edits
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Leeturtle]] || 2026-05-11T02:30:41Z || [[User:Leeturtle]] || 4,796
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Emmanuel Anin]] || 2026-05-11T20:29:49Z || [[User:Emmanuel Anin]] || 7,733
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Mbaidoo]] || 2026-06-02T15:11:32Z || [[User:Mbaidoo]] || 2,681
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[Hardware donation program/vinoda mamatharai]] || 2026-05-11T11:04:34Z || [[User:Vinoda mamatharai]] || 8,672
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Thirumalgoud]] || 2026-03-05T18:02:48Z || [[User:Thirumalgoud]] || 4,920
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Agbalagba]] || 2026-05-21T17:11:54Z || [[User:Agbalagba]] || 10,837
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Thiyagu Ganesh]] || 2026-03-05T17:27:04Z || [[User:Thiyagu Ganesh]] || 5,922

|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Amikeco]] || 2026-05-07T21:01:41Z || [[User:Amikeco]] || 37,035
|-

|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Cbrescia]] || 2026-06-01T18:36:40Z || [[User:Felino Volador]] || 126,759
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Dezedien]] || 2026-03-05T18:12:26Z || [[User:Dezedien]] || 64,196
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Vinoda mamatharai]] || 2026-05-13T11:24:01Z || [[User:Vinoda mamatharai]] || 8,672
|-

|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Pharouqenr]] || 2026-05-07T17:20:57Z || [[User:Pharouqenr]] || 63,241
|}

=== Draft requests ===

{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Page !! Last edited !! User !! Global edits
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Adeyinka Ekundayo]] || 2026-06-08T05:01:30Z || [[User:Adeyinka Ekundayo]] || 629
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Africany]] || 2026-05-06T14:34:58Z || [[User:Africany]] || 17,047
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/AKibombo]] || 2021-02-25T05:37:12Z || [[User:AKibombo]] || 13,251
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Albetudu]] || 2026-06-03T16:02:20Z || [[User:Albetudu]] || 3,018
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Amikeco]] || 2026-05-07T21:01:41Z || [[User:Amikeco]] || 37,035
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Asamoah Daniel Kwame Oware]] || 2026-05-11T13:55:43Z || [[User:Asamoah Daniel Kwame Oware]] || 4,045
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Ashish D Souza]] || 2018-04-23T07:57:48Z || [[User:Ashish D Souza]] || 170
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Babulbaishya]] || 2023-02-21T02:47:13Z || [[User:BabulB]] || 59,982
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Balu1967]] || 2023-02-10T10:27:48Z || [[User:Balu1967]] || 68,143
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Bamjos]] || 2026-06-19T04:07:12Z || [[User:Bamjos]] || 18,684
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Bembety]] || 2026-05-18T09:56:58Z || [[User:Bembety]] || 37,531
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/BENET G AMANNA]] || 2023-02-27T07:53:35Z || [[User:BENET G AMANNA]] || 1,642
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/CalebTokula6]] || 2026-05-08T10:32:07Z || [[User:CalebTokula6]] || 953
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Charles Kalanzi]] || 2026-05-06T12:34:56Z || [[User:Charles Kalanzi]] || 5,992
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Chicocvenancio]] || 2019-02-27T22:04:36Z || [[User:Chicocvenancio]] || 35,726
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Chizoba Amanambu]] || 2026-05-06T18:01:43Z || [[User:Chizoba Amanambu]] || 95
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Ennydavids]] || 2026-05-06T13:03:22Z || [[User:Ennydavids]] || 4,281
|-

|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Ibrahim abusufyan]] || 2026-05-07T16:12:56Z || [[User:Ibrahim abusufyan]] || 39,678
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Jurema Moraes de Oliveira]] || 2020-01-30T11:10:33Z || [[User:Jurema Moraes de Oliveira]] || unknown
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/justwiki]] || 2026-05-14T22:35:17Z || [[User:Justwiki]] || 103,596
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Kalakpagh]] || 2026-05-10T10:11:20Z || [[User:Kalakpagh]] || 41,218
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Kikanakana]] || 2026-06-16T16:26:07Z || [[User:Kikanakana]] || 2,210
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Knowledge and philosophy]] || 2026-05-07T02:09:57Z || [[User:Knowledge and philosophy]] || 3,399
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[Hardware donation program/हिंदुस्थान वासी]] || 2019-09-07T09:36:11Z || [[User:हिंदुस्थान वासी]] || 61,968
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/নৰুনা বৰুৱা]] || 2026-06-17T05:53:46Z || [[User:নৰুনা বৰুৱা]] || 15,940
|}
